products.name: Burro da centrifuga
pros: Considered higher quality than butter made from cream separation
Produced by rapid centrifugation, resulting in sweeter and better taste
Preferred by Altroconsumo as top choice for butter selection

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2026 guide recommends butter made by centrifugation as the superior choice, citing its higher quality, sweeter flavor and production method.
videoSource: Burro: come sceglierlo, tipi, calorie e quanto consumarne
